name: Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread nuts in a baking pan and bake at 325°F for 8 minutes or until lightly toasted. Let cool and finely chop.
2. With an electric mixer, beat the cheese and sugar until smooth. Mix in eggs, vanilla extract, Amaretto, and sour cream. Reserve 2 tablespoons of nuts.
3. Stir in the remaining nuts. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan. Sprinkle reserved nuts on top.
4. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes or until just barely set. Turn off the oven, leave the door ajar, and let cool in the oven for 1 hour longer.
5. Chill. To serve, remove the pan sides and cut into wedges.
